title: Per-State ALJ Allowance Rate at the Hearing Stage, FY2025 YTD (Computed)
description: Computed per-state aggregation of ALJ hearing-stage outcomes for FY2025 YTD: for each of 49 states, the ALJ count, total dispositions, decisions, awards, denials, fully/partially favorable counts, and the derived allowance rate (awards ÷ decisions, percent). Built by joining alj-disposition-by-judge-LATEST.csv to hearing-office-to-state.csv. Rates are office-state, not claimant-state.
unit_of_observation: state (office-state) at the ALJ hearing stage

columns.name: by_state[].alj_count
columns.description: Number of ALJs attributed to the state.

source.title: Per-state ALJ allowance rate (computed from OHO ALJ disposition + office-to-state mapping)

license: U.S. public domain (SSA, with project-computed aggregation)
notes: Computed: aggregated by scripts/build-oho-state-aggregates.js from alj-disposition-by-judge-LATEST.csv (1,439 ALJ rows processed) joined via hearing-office-to-state.csv. Top-level keys: source, joined_via, built_at (2026-05-05), alj_rows_processed=1439, states_with_data=49, unmapped_offices=[] (none unmapped), caveat, by_state. CAVEAT (from file): allowance_rate_pct = awards/decisions; decisions excludes dismissals; ALJs hearing remotely show their primary office so rates are office-state, not claimant-state; NHC (national hearing centers) and SPECIAL (review cadre) tracked separately. This '-LATEST' file has NO dated sibling in the directory (sole copy) and follows the LATEST naming convention; period is FY2025 YTD.
